text.content:
⚗ Thin-Blood Alchemy

Level 1: Far Reach

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Res + Alchemy | Type: Utility

Telekinetically move objects at a distance. You can manipulate objects up to 10 meters away as if using one hand with Strength 1. This increases to Strength 2 at Alchemy 3 and Strength 3 at Alchemy 5. You can open doors, pull triggers, throw switches, and hurl small objects. Cannot be used to grapple or deal direct damage. Requires concentration — performing other actions while maintaining Far Reach imposes a 2-dice penalty to both. Lasts one scene.

Level 1: Haze

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: -- | Type: Utility

Create a cloud of thick, cold fog centered on yourself. The fog fills a 10-meter radius and reduces visibility to arm's length. All ranged attacks through the fog suffer a 3-dice penalty. The fog is obviously unnatural if produced indoors or on a clear night. You can see normally within your own fog. The fog moves with you unless you choose to leave it stationary. Lasts one scene or until dispersed by strong wind.

Level 2: Envelop

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Res + Alchemy vs Sta + Athletics | Type: Combat

Direct your Haze to surround a specific target, filling their lungs and eyes. Mortals choke and are blinded: -3 dice to all actions. Vampires are blinded but not suffocated. The target must roll Str + Athletics (Difficulty = your successes) each turn to move out of the cloud. Range: the target must be within your existing Haze. Moving the Envelop to a new target requires a new activation.

Level 2: Profane Hieros Gamos

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Alchemy | Type: Utility

Perform an alchemical ritual to brew a potion from your blood and mundane ingredients. The potion can replicate the effect of a single Level 1 Discipline power from any discipline. The brewing takes 1 hour and produces one dose that remains potent for one night. Anyone who drinks the potion gains the power for one scene. The specific power replicated must be chosen during brewing and requires appropriate ingredients (determined by the Storyteller).

Level 3: Defractionate

Cost: 1 Rouse per tincture | Pool: Int + Alchemy | Type: Utility

Separate your vitae into its mystical components through an alchemical process. This allows you to create specialized tinctures: healing draughts (restore 2 Superficial Health damage), courage elixirs (+2 to frenzy resistance), alertness serums (+2 to Perception for one scene), or vitae purifiers (cleanse blood of toxins or Blood Bond influence). Each tincture takes 30 minutes to prepare and lasts one night. You can prepare a number of tinctures per night equal to your Alchemy rating.

Level 3: Airborne Momentum

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Res + Alchemy | Type: Utility

Grant yourself the ability to fly or levitate. Movement speed equals your walking speed. You can hover stationary, ascend vertically, and maneuver in three dimensions. Maximum altitude: approximately 100 meters. Flying is obviously supernatural and a major Masquerade concern. In combat, airborne targets are harder to hit with melee (+2 Difficulty). Lasts one scene. If the power ends while airborne, you fall normally.

Level 4: Counterfeit Discipline (Lesser)

Cost: 2 Rouse | Pool: Int + Alchemy | Type: Utility

Brew a potion that grants a Level 1-2 Discipline power from any discipline to the drinker. The potion takes 2 hours to brew, requires specialized ingredients related to the power being replicated (fangs for Potence, a predator's eyes for Auspex, etc.), and remains potent for one week. The drinker gains the chosen power for one scene per dose. You can have multiple potions prepared simultaneously. Each potion requires its own Rouse check to create.

Level 5: Counterfeit Discipline (Greater)

Cost: 3 Rouse | Pool: Int + Alchemy (Difficulty +2) | Type: Utility

As Counterfeit Discipline (Lesser), but can replicate Level 3-4 Discipline powers. The brewing process takes 4 hours and requires rare, expensive, or morally questionable ingredients. The potion lasts for 3 nights before losing potency. Higher-level powers are more difficult to counterfeit: the brewing roll is made at +2 Difficulty. Failing the roll wastes the ingredients and the Rouse check. Can replicate any Discipline power except Level 5 powers and Amalgam powers.
